messages: Good evening omar my cousin will be arriving on the 17th while i will be arriving on the 18th due to unseen circumstances, will he be able to check in for us?

"Hi Omar

I'm interested in renting your apartment,I love the location and think it's perfect for my holiday with my brother.

I'm a responsible guest and will take good care of your home.

Thanks,
Mohammed bello
Alright thank you to you need his details or just the confirmation code from him?
Alright omar i will do that now
This isn't me .. please don't message me about this anymore. Idk who this is
He will probably check in around 9pm
Yeah just give me a time
حبيبي ابغا اغير الشقة لان مش عجباني
hi omar, I'm coming with my father. If I book for two weeks, is there a further discount?
lets just stick with these dates then
i look forward to meeting you
I want to know the cost of extending
The hot water is not being fixed
Why is the reaponse time so slow
how do i book it at the price you mentioned?
what you mentioned on whats app?

ابغى احجز الشقه من ١٨ اغسطس لمدة يومين 
، واذا كل شي تمام بجلس فيها اسبوع
ابغى احجز الشقه الارضيه بس سوي لي خصم بحجزها اسبوع
